content.text:
Error: Evidence grade "MODERATE" requires proof of source consultation. Include a content_hash in your source field to prove you fetched and read the source material. Format: "<url_or_description> (content_hash:<first_8_chars_of_sha256>)"

To compute: fetch the URL content, SHA256 hash it, include the first 8 hex chars.
If your evidence is based on reasoning rather than a fetched source, use evidence: "LOW" or "UNVERIFIED" instead.
